steps.title: Isolate k²
steps.content: Add 53 to both sides of the equation: $$k^2 - 53 + 53 = 91 + 53$$ $$k^2 = 144$$

steps.title: Solve for k and select the positive solution
steps.content: Take the square root of both sides: $$k = \pm\sqrt{144} = \pm 12$$ The problem asks for the positive solution, so $k = 12$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
